flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Stillman College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (63.6% → 52.8%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Stillman College rose 104% between 2021 and 2024 (6.5% → 13.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Stillman College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Stillman College rose 71% between 2021 and 2024 (14.7% → 25.0%).
